events.title: Lebanon reports 14 killed in Israeli strikes amid continued hostilities
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon resulted in the deaths of at least 14 people, according to the Lebanese health ministry. This occurred despite Iran's threat to retaliate if bombing continued. Hezbollah reported targeting Israeli troops within Lebanon.

events.title: Iran threatens to overcome US naval blockade
events.desc: Iran's top negotiator, Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf, stated that Tehran would turn the US naval blockade into another defeat for the 'enemy'. He emphasized a strategy of fighting and negotiating on Iran's own terms, with the ultimate goal of ending the war and achieving stable security.

events.title: Israel launches strikes on Beirut suburbs amid escalating Hezbollah conflict
events.desc: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu ordered strikes on Beirut suburbs, specifically targeting the Hezbollah stronghold of Dahieh, in response to attacks on Israeli civilians. Thousands have fled the area.

events.title: US and Iran engage in strikes around Strait of Hormuz; Kuwait condemns attacks
events.desc: The US military conducted strikes on Iranian radar sites, while Iran reported targeting US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain. Kuwait has condemned the repeated Iranian attacks.

events.title: Italian prosecutors investigate Israeli minister Ben-Gvir over Gaza flotilla incident
events.desc: Italian prosecutors have placed Israel's National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir under investigation for suspicion of torture and kidnapping concerning the treatment of activists on a Gaza flotilla. This follows reports of the incident.

events.title: Israel strikes Gaza City, killing 11
events.desc: Israeli military actions in Gaza City resulted in the deaths of eleven people, including women and children, after strikes on four residential buildings. Israel claims the operation targeted four Hamas security officials.

events.title: US military assisted Israel in intercepting Iranian missiles
events.desc: The US military played a role in helping Israel intercept Iranian missile barrages. This intervention occurred despite the White House publicly expressing opposition to Israeli strikes on Iranian targets.

events.title: Lebanese general among three killed in Israeli car strike
events.desc: An Israeli attack on a vehicle in southern Lebanon resulted in the deaths of three soldiers, including a Lebanese general. The Israeli military is investigating the incident in a region where clashes with Hezbollah are ongoing.

events.title: One killed, five injured in shooting incident in Israel
events.desc: A shooting incident occurred in Israel where the suspect fired from a vehicle across multiple locations before being killed by authorities. One person died and five others were injured.

events.title: Iranian drone strikes target Kuwait airport, killing one and injuring dozens
events.desc: Iran carried out drone attacks on Kuwait's airport, resulting in one fatality and dozens of injuries. This action was stated by Iran as retaliation for earlier US strikes on an Iranian oil tanker and an island.

events.title: CCTV captures deadly strike on Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine
events.desc: CCTV footage documented a missile strike in Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine, which resulted in two fatalities and 23 injuries.

events.title: China's Guizhou province hit by severe floods
events.desc: Severe floods have caused widespread destruction in China's Guizhou province, submerging entire neighborhoods, roads, and farmland. Drone footage captured the extent of the devastation.

events.title: Israel launches strikes on Beirut suburb days after US-brokered truce
events.desc: Israel stated that attacks on the Lebanese capital's suburbs were in response to Hezbollah firing at Israeli territory, escalating tensions shortly after a US-brokered truce.

events.title: Clashes persist in Lebanon despite ceasefire acceptance
events.desc: Hostilities continue in Lebanon between Israel and Hezbollah, even as both parties have reportedly accepted a US-brokered partial ceasefire plan. This ongoing conflict is seen as a critical factor for the broader peace process with Iran.

events.title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon, truce appears to hold
events.desc: Israel has continued its military campaign in southern Lebanon. However, a partial truce with Hezbollah, announced after US intervention, appears to be holding, with no strikes reported in Beirut.

events.title: Iran and Israel pause strikes, warn of retaliation
events.desc: Both Iran and Israel have indicated a temporary halt to their strikes, with warnings of retaliation if the ceasefire is breached again. Israel's Prime Minister stated the country is holding fire 'at the moment'.

events.title: US Congressman demands probe into Israel's 1967 attack on USS Liberty
events.desc: US Congressman Thomas Massie has called for an investigation into Israel's 1967 attack on the USS Liberty, suggesting it was not an accident and urging the US government to honor survivors.

events.title: Funeral held for baby killed by Israeli troops in West Bank
events.desc: A funeral was held for a seven-month-old baby who was fatally shot by Israeli troops in the occupied West Bank. The infant's body was carried by his father, draped in a Palestinian flag.

events.title: US denies entry to Somali referee over vetting concerns
events.desc: The US confirmed it denied entry to Somali referee Omar Artan, who was scheduled to participate in the World Cup, citing 'vetting concerns' after his arrival in Miami.

events.title: UN human rights chief urges lifting of Cuba sanctions
events.desc: UN High Commissioner for Human Rights, Volker Turk, has called for the immediate lifting of US sanctions on Cuba, warning that 'children are dying' as a consequence of the oil blockade.

events.title: EU plans further sanctions on Russia's military and individuals
events.desc: The European Union is reportedly planning to expand its sanctions against Russia, targeting the 'military industrial complex, human rights violators and propagandists'. This adds to the existing $1.5 trillion in sanctions.

events.title: US and Israel's Iran war efforts noted by Trump
events.desc: Former US President Donald Trump reportedly warned Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu against reigniting a war with Iran, stating that Israel might find itself fighting alone if it proceeded.
